segments.text: Forget not my law; but let thine heart keep my commandments
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Length of days, and long life, and peace, shall they add to thee
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Let not mercy and truth forsake thee: bind them about thy neck; write them upon the table of thine heart
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: So shalt thou find favour and good understanding in the sight of God and man
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Trust in the LORD with all thine heart; and lean not unto thine own understanding
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: In all thy ways acknowledge him, and he shall direct thy paths
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Be not wise in thine own eyes: fear the LORD, and depart from evil
segments.speaker: Solomon

heading: Wisdom and Fear of the Lord

segments.text: It shall be health to thy navel, and marrow to thy bones
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Honour the LORD with thy substance, and with the firstfruits of all thine increase
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: So shall thy barns be filled with plenty, and thy presses shall burst out with new wine
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: My son, despise not the chastening of the LORD; neither be weary of his correction
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Whom the LORD loveth he correcteth; even as a father the son in whom he delighteth
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Happy is the man that findeth wisdom, and the man that getteth understanding
segments.speaker: Solomon

footnotes: that getteth…: Heb. that draweth out understanding
heading: The Value of Wisdom

segments.text: For the merchandise of it is better than the merchandise of silver, and the gain thereof than fine gold
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: She is more precious than rubies: and all the things thou canst desire are not to be compared unto her
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Length of days is in her right hand; and in her left hand riches and honour
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Her ways are ways of pleasantness, and all her paths are peace
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: She is a tree of life to them that lay hold upon her: and happy is every one that retaineth her
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: By wisdom hath founded the earth; by understanding hath he established the heavens
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: By his knowledge the depths are broken up, and the clouds drop down the dew
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: My son, let not them depart from thine eyes: keep sound wisdom and discretion
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: So shall they be life unto thy soul, and grace to thy neck
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Then shalt thou walk in thy way safely, and thy foot shall not stumble
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: When thou liest down, thou shalt not be afraid: yea, thou shalt lie down, and thy sleep shall be sweet
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Be not afraid of sudden fear, neither of the desolation of the wicked, when it cometh
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For the LORD shall be thy confidence, and shall keep thy foot from being taken
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Withhold not good from them to whom it is due, when it is in the power of thine hand to do it
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Say not unto thy neighbour, Go, and come again, and to morrow I will give; when thou hast it by thee
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Devise not evil against thy neighbour, seeing he dwelleth securely by thee
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Strive not with a man without cause, if he have done thee no harm
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Envy thou not the oppressor, and choose none of his ways
segments.speaker: Solomon

footnotes: the oppressor: Heb. a man of violence
heading: Warning Against Envy

segments.text: The froward is abomination to the LORD: but his secret is with the righteous
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The curse of the LORD is in the house of the wicked: but he blesseth the habitation of the just
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Surely he scorneth the scorners: but he giveth grace unto the lowly
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The wise shall inherit glory: but shame shall be the promotion of fools
segments.speaker: Solomon

footnotes: shall be…: Heb. exalteth the fools
